task: Publish the Family AI Operating System flagship article with a hero, four graphics, social cards, and announcement drafts.
surface: FrankX blog article, blog listing card, Open Graph/social visual package, and draft announcement copy.
audience: Family stewards, founder/operators, builders, and younger learners who need a practical map for AI tools, assets, and safety habits.
first_read: AI should become a governed family operating system: learn, build, verify, protect, teach, and compound.

references.label: FrankX brand pack
references.reason: Sets direct founder-facing voice, dark editorial material language, emerald/cyan tech spectrum, and restrained amber signals.

references.label: Premium Web OS
references.reason: Requires scene brief, static composition, asset provenance, visual QA, and release checks.

references.label: Official platform documentation
references.source: OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Google Antigravity, Base, Hermes Agent, Investor.gov, FINRA, SEC, IRS
references.reason: Grounds fast-changing AI platform and asset-risk claims in current primary sources.

keep: Clear platform, asset, and safety maps
direction.signature: A governed family AI core connects agents, assets, protection, and teaching into one compounding operating loop.
system: Production-rendered FrankX typography composited into PNG outputs
Exact PNG diagrams with emerald/cyan signal lines and restrained amber risk notes
No stock imagery or external asset rights dependency
No motion or 3D because the article needs clarity over spectacle

asset_quality.why_premium: The article hero needs a premium bitmap image, so the base was generated with the built-in imagegen skill and finished with exact typography. The supporting graphics are PNG exports with exact labels so they avoid AI text artifacts while publishing as bitmap assets.

artifacts.notes: Built-in imagegen source scene: family/founder command table with AI, code, asset, and home cues.
Hero PNG uses imagegen source plus exact production-rendered FrankX typography.
Platform interconnect map with verification layers.
Educational asset stack and risk/liquidity map.
Wide social crop with exact text.
Square social crop with exact text.
Vertical social crop with exact text.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier B raster package: imagegen hero plus exact PNG diagrams and social cards.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: PNG exports were inspected locally: imagegen hero, wide/square/vertical social cards, and four infographic graphics.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: PNG package uses stable dimensions, high contrast text, no generated text artifacts, and no external media.

checks.name: motion-reduced-motion
checks.evidence: No motion, video, or audio assets are used.

checks.name: rights-provenance
checks.evidence: Hero source was generated with the built-in imagegen tool and saved into the workspace evidence folder; final assets are owned PNG outputs.

score.notes: 5 first read, 5 brand fit, 5 craft, 4 accessibility/responsive pending live crop check, 5 provenance/accuracy, 4 usefulness across article/social.

known_risks: External platform facts can age quickly and should be rechecked during future revisions.
PNG social cards should be compressed later if channel upload limits require it.
